description: Invoke when creating, updating, or validating skills. Apply conciseness principle to all skill content. Validate with `python skills/building-skills/scripts/validate.py` after edits. For context strategy (skill vs CLAUDE.md vs MCP), read optimizing-context skill instead.

results.query: Claude keeps ignoring my custom instructions, can we turn them into something more structured and reusable
can you validate this SKILL.md file for me before I ship it
I want to create reusable instructions Claude should follow automatically whenever I ask it to review PDFs
